spec_match.rationale: The demo now showcases current text-fit: grow and text-fit: shrink values within a standard hero banner layout; DevTools MCP verification is still blocked in this session.

interactive.rationale: The width range slider, text input, mode toggles, and preset buttons remain wired, but the required chrome-devtools-mcp interaction pass was unavailable.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the index page blurb's description of an editable hero section perfectly.

edge_cases.rationale: The preset buttons are explicitly designed to test edge cases like single characters ('W', 'AI') and very long sentences.

references.rationale: The parent index contains the required reference link, though adding it directly here would make the concept page self-contained.

design_system.rationale: Excellent design system utilization, following responsive guidelines and standard typography.

openQuestions.title: Add direct spec / ChromeStatus link to see also list
openQuestions.detail: To ensure compliance and standard spec tracking on every standalone page, we should add a link to the ChromeStatus entry and the CSS spec under the see also section.

summary: Static repair updated the hero editor from obsolete contain/scale-down syntax to current text-fit: grow and text-fit: shrink modes. Browser verification remains blocked until chrome-devtools-mcp is available.
